calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Off Calendar

Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Lawrence Lockwood, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Allianz/Firearms Fund.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Curtis Mac Homes, LP, a California Limited Partnership.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness Lorrie Leonard sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
Declaration re: lost documents signed by the Court.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $50,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $7027.40
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $618
Total Judgment in the amount of $57,645.40
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
